name: Shiny Black "C"
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>びか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>りする<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｇ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During either player's turn, when exactly 1 Synchro Monster is Special Summoned to your opponent's side of the field: You can banish this card from your Graveyard to target that face-up Synchro Monster; destroy that target.
mnst_eff: During either player's turn, when exactly 1 Synchro Monster is Special Summoned to your opponent's side of the field: You can banish this card from your Graveyard to target that face-up Synchro Monster; destroy that target.
eff: During either player's turn, when exactly 1 Synchro Monster is Special Summoned to your opponent's side of the field: You can banish this card from your Graveyard to target that face-up Synchro Monster; destroy that target.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
